overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long GLXY Daily ETF (GLGG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of Galaxy Digital Inc. Class A (NASDAQ: GLXY), less fees and expenses, through derivatives such as swap agreements. GLGG was launched on Aug 21, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
